news.headline: From battlefields to data centres: The US-Iran war in the age of AI
news.summary:
<p>The US-Israel war with Iran has shifted conflict from battlefields to data centres, software engineers and civilian technologies — turning them into both enablers of military power and its most vulnerable targets.</p>
